phrases.intent_en: Ask where the tourist information office is
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde está la oficina de turismo?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nos DEE-as, DON-de es-TAH la o-FEE-sya de tu-RIS-mo?

likely_response.local: Junto a la cinta 3, a la izquierda.
likely_response.pronunciation: HOON-toh AH LAH THEEN-tah AH LAH eeth-k-ee-EHR-dah
likely_response.translation_en: In the arrivals terminal, on the left.

responses.english: In the arrivals terminal, on the left.
responses.phonetic: HOON-toh AH LAH THEEN-tah AH LAH eeth-k-ee-EHR-dah
responses.french: Junto a la cinta 3, a la izquierda.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to find ground transportation
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde puedo encontrar el transporte terrestre?
phrases.pronunciation: boo-EH-nohs DÍ-ahs DÓN-deh poo-EH-doh ehn-kohnt-RAHR EHL trahns-POHR-teh tehr-REH-streh

likely_response.local: Fuera, junto a la salida principal.
likely_response.pronunciation: foo-EH-rah HOON-toh AH LAH sah-LEE-dah preen-thee-PAHL
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the green signs towards the exit.

responses.english: Follow the green signs towards the exit.
responses.phonetic: foo-EH-rah HOON-toh AH LAH sah-LEE-dah preen-thee-PAHL
responses.french: Fuera, junto a la salida principal.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the currency exchange is
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde hay una casa de cambio?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, ¿DOHN-deh eye OO-nah KAH-sah deh kahm-BEE-oh?

likely_response.local: En la sala de salidas, planta baja.
likely_response.pronunciation: EHN LAH SAH-lah DEH sah-LEE-dahs PLAHN-tah BAH-hah
likely_response.translation_en: In the departures hall, ground floor.

responses.english: In the departures hall, ground floor.
responses.phonetic: EHN LAH SAH-lah DEH sah-LEE-dahs PLAHN-tah BAH-hah
responses.french: En la sala de salidas, planta baja.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the bus stop to Girona is
phrases.text_local: Disculpe, ¿dónde está la parada de autobús hacia Girona?
phrases.pronunciation: dees-KOOL-peh, DOHN-deh es-TAH lah pah-RAH-dah deh ow-toh-BOOS ah-SYAH hee-ROH-nah?

likely_response.local: Fuera de la terminal, salida número tres.
likely_response.pronunciation: foo-EH-rah DEH LAH tehr-mee-NAHL sah-LEE-dah NÚ-meh-roh TREHS
likely_response.translation_en: Outside the terminal, exit number three.

responses.english: Outside the terminal, exit number three.
responses.phonetic: foo-EH-rah DEH LAH tehr-mee-NAHL sah-LEE-dah NÚ-meh-roh TREHS
responses.french: Fuera de la terminal, salida número tres.
